title: Theme editor
description: Design a theme by dragging widgets onto the page. No code.

canvas.emptyTemplate: Nothing here yet. Add a section to start.

inspector.themeHint: Colours, type and spacing for the whole theme. A site owner can change these after installing it.
inspector.unknownWidget: This build does not know "{type}". It is kept as-is.
inspector.currentBinding: This widget shows the page being viewed. On Home and Archive there is no single page, so it renders nothing.
inspector.budgetFull: All {max} content lists are used. Reuse an existing question — same type, count and order — or free one up.

errors.denied: You do not have permission to design themes.
errors.noColumn: Add a section first — a widget lives in a column.
errors.buildDenied: You do not have permission to install unreviewed theme code. Building a design does that.

hints.contentType: A type this site actually has. A theme installed elsewhere shows an empty list if that site has no such type.

heading.label: Heading
heading.description: A title. Fixed text you type here.

button.label: Button
button.description: A link that looks like a button.

image.label: Image
image.description: A picture the theme ships or the site uploaded.

logo.label: Logo
logo.description: The site's own logo, or its name when it has none.

menu.label: Menu
menu.description: The menu the site assigned to a location.

postTitle.label: Page title
postTitle.description: The title of the page being viewed.

postContent.label: Page content
postContent.description: The blocks an editor wrote on the page being viewed.

postList.label: Content list
postList.description: Real pages or posts from the site — the newest six, say.

publish.heading: Publish
publish.noKey: You need a publisher key to sign a theme. It is your identity on the marketplace.
publish.passphraseHint: This never leaves your browser. It is the only thing protecting your key — use several unrelated words.
publish.importExisting: I already have a key from `zcms keygen`
publish.importHint: Paste publisher-private.pem. It is wrapped with your passphrase here and never sent in the clear.
publish.keySaved: Key saved. Register the public key at the marketplace to become a publisher.
publish.publicKeyHint: Register this at marketplace.z-cms.org. Safe to share.
publish.buildFirst: Build the design first — a signature covers what was built.
publish.signed: Signed. Upload the .zcms at the marketplace developer portal.
publish.submitHint: Signed packages are uploaded at the marketplace developer portal, where a reviewer reads them before release.
publish.forgetHint: Removes the stored blob. Themes you already published keep working — readers verify the marketplace's signature, not yours. You cannot publish an update without the key.
publish.unsupported: This browser cannot do Ed25519 signing. Use a current Chrome, Safari or Firefox — or sign with `zcms pack`.
publish.keyLoadFailed: Could not load your publisher key.
publish.keySaveFailed: Could not save your publisher key.
publish.keyDeleteFailed: Could not remove your publisher key.
publish.sealFailed: Could not build the signed package.
publish.noBuild: There is no build to sign.
publish.publishDenied: You do not have permission to publish to the marketplace.
publish.tokenHint: Create an API token under Tokens in the marketplace developer portal, then paste it here. It is stored encrypted and never shown again. It can submit packages and nothing else.
publish.tokenSaveFailed: Could not save the marketplace token.
